StageDesc_01Ev17_02.english: You mean that person was T-4 Kheshig?

StageDesc_01Ev18_05.english: This is a facility created with great care by Makina, T-9 Gremlin, Azaz, and Mari.
StageDesc_01Ev18_05.korean: 마키나, 그렘린, 아자즈, 마리가 심혈을 기울여 만든 시설입니다.

StageDesc_01Ev22_02.english: To EB-48G Hraesvelgr, this place is a holy land. Anyway, to think there is still chocolate left like this…
StageDesc_01Ev22_02.korean: 흐레스벨그에게 이곳은 성지입니다. 그건 그렇고 아직 초콜릿이 이렇게 남아있을 줄이야…

StageDesc_02Ev17_01C.english: ※ Caution: The difficulty is very high. Led by the Khan the Swift, you must escape the layered ambush of Iron Bugs.
StageDesc_02Ev17_01C.korean: ※ 주의 : 난이도가 매우 높습니다. 신속의 칸을 필두로, 겹겹이 둘러싼 철충의 매복을 빠져나가야 합니다.

StageDesc_02Ev17_02C.english: ※ Warning: The difficulty is very high. The Iron bug's encirclement is closing in. How should T-4 Kheshig handle this situation?
StageDesc_02Ev17_02C.korean: ※ 주의 : 난이도가 매우 높습니다. 철충의 포위망이 점점 다가오고 있습니다. 케시크는 이 상황을 어떻게 대처해야 할까요?

StageDesc_02Ev22_03B.english: My special move is the Black AL Phantom Shoot.

StageDesc_03Ev19_04B.english: One day, T-2 Brownie discovers that a suspicious game is being uploaded to the game center without permission.
StageDesc_03Ev19_04B.korean: 어느 날, 브라우니는 게임센터에 수상한 게임이 무단으로 업로드 되는 것을 발견합니다.

StageDesc_03Ev33_06.english: X-00 Tiamat has a small worry...

StageDesc_11_03.english: While on a mission in Europe, AL Phantom and Wraith accidentally discover Delta's new weapon.
StageDesc_11_03.korean: 유럽에서 임무를 수행하던 팬텀과 레이스는 우연히 델타의 새로운 병기를 발견하게 됩니다.​

StageDesc_12N01_01.english: The identity of the helper who appeared in front of Connector Yumi is…

StageDesc_12N02_05B.english: The Watcher MQ-20 obtained information about the Yeti and organized an expedition team.
StageDesc_12N02_05B.korean: 와쳐가 예티에 대한 정보를 입수하고 탐사대를 구성했습니다.

StageDesc_12N02_14.english: A week ago, Sadius of Retribution…

StageDesc_12N02_15.english: On the day of the agreement, Sadius of Retribution…

StageDesc_12N03_10B.english: Danger also comes to Sonia of Devastation and the Dutch girl.

Vargr1ED_72.english: Since Dione, Serpent, and Benevolent Leanne are all good at swimming.
Vargr1ED_72.korean: 디오네랑 서펀트, 리앤 모두 수영엔 일가견이 있으니까.

Vargr1ED_82.english: Thank you so much, Benevolent Leanne. It was overwhelming for just the two of us to manage Aqua Land with Serpent.
Vargr1ED_82.korean: 정말 고마워요, 리앤 씨. 서펀트 씨와 둘이서만 아쿠아 랜드를 관리하기에는 버거웠거든요.

Vargr2ED_27.english: It’s deep water for LRL or C-33 Andvari... but Vargr, isn’t it deep enough for someone like you to stand in?
Vargr2ED_27.korean: LRL이나 안드바리한테 깊은 물이긴 한데… 바르그, 너 정도면 충분히 서 있을 만한 수심 아냐?

Vargr2ED_48.english: Is that so? But Janghwa and Cheona were dropping just fine... That's strange.
Vargr2ED_48.korean: 그런가? 하지만 장화랑 천아는 잘만 뜨던데… 이상하군.

Vargr3ED_3.english: Swimming is actually an exercise that burns a tremendous amount of calories. You know how hard Benevolent Leanne struggled when she first learned to swim?
Vargr3ED_3.korean:
원래 수영은 칼로리 소모가 엄청난 운동이야.
리앤도 수영을 처음 배웠을 땐 얼마나 힘들어했는데?

Vargr3ED_33.english: Your feelings for the Commander are just as strong as Goltarion XIII's feelings for Faucre the Evil Overlord, aren't they?
Vargr3ED_33.korean: 너도 사령관에 대한 마음, 골타리온이 뽀끄루한테 가진 감정에 뒤지지 않잖아?

Vargr3ED_75.english: The grace you have shown in forgiving me for having deceived you, my lord, and in helping me reclaim the remains of Lady Maria of Redemption Rioboros, is a debt I could never fully repay, even if I dedicated the rest of my life to doing so.
Vargr3ED_75.korean: 지금까지 주인님을 기만했던 저를 용서해 주시고, 나아가 마리아 리오보로스 님의 유해를 되찾게 도와주신 은혜, 제 평생을 다 바쳐 보은하더라도 부족할 것입니다.

Vargr3ED_86.english: She's not here! Can you see Ms. Benevolent Leanne?

Vargr4ED_38.english: … I heard that unlike me, Cheona, Janghwa, and Fafnir received severe corporal punishment, but…
Vargr4ED_38.korean: …나와는 다르게 천아와 장화, 파프니르는 심한 체벌을 받았다는 이야기를 들었지만…

Vargr4ED_56.english: - … Fafnir took the crayon that C-33 Andvari often carried around and started drawing.
Vargr4ED_56.korean: - …파프니르는 안드바리가 자주 들고 다니는 크레용을 들고 그림을 그리기 시작했다.

Vargr4ED_76.english: Strangely, it's hard to say anything to Fafnir. Is it because he feels like the youngest sibling who gets scolded by Cheona, Janghwa, and Vargr...?
Vargr4ED_76.korean:
- 이상하게 파프니르한테는 뭐라고 하기가 어렵다.
천아랑 장화, 바르그한테 야단맞는 막내 느낌이라서 그런가…

Vargr4ED_99.english: Oh, by the way, I'm planning to go somewhere far away for this vacation, so have Janghwa and Cheona clean the accommodation thoroughly.
Vargr4ED_99.korean: 참, 이번 휴가는 먼 곳으로 갈 생각이니, 장화와 천아를 시켜 숙소 청소를 잘해놓도록.

Vargr5ED_24.english: After Deconstructor Azaz disappeared leaving a bombshell, three members who had signed up to volunteer as lifeguards this summer came to visit.
Vargr5ED_24.korean:
- 아자즈가 폭탄 발언을 남기고 사라진 뒤,
이번 여름부터 라이프가드로 봉사활동을 신청한 세 명의 대원이 찾아왔다.

Vargr5ED_3.english: … Deconstructor Azaz, what brings you here?

Vargr5ED_9.english: There was nothing there the last time I checked the panel… Could it be, Deconstructor Azaz…?
Vargr5ED_9.korean: 마지막으로 패널을 확인했을 때는 아무것도 없었는데… 설마, 아자즈…?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.english: Rhode was just standing still... Why was she dragged here...
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.korean: 로데는 그냥 가만히 있었을 뿐인데… 왜 여기로 끌려온 건가요…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_9.english: I'm telling you, Rhode isn't a maid.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_63.english: Don't stay here like this, get up, Rhode.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_10.english: Do you happen to know Cardinal Armand?

shidenmissorka1ED_10.english: Oh! The Magical Magical MoMo combo used by the Lord has landed!
shidenmissorka1ED_10.korean: 오오! 주공께서 쓰시는 매지컬 모모의 콤보가 들어갔습니다!

shidenmissorka1ED_23.english: Since the T-3 Leprechaun used by Shiden was a character I knew very well, I was able to respond to its movements somehow.
shidenmissorka1ED_23.korean: - 시덴이 사용한 레프리콘은 내가 무척 잘 아는 캐릭터였기에, 어떻게든 움직임에 대응할 수 있었다.

shidenmissorka1ED_28.english: Magical Magical MoMo, the character you are using, is a character recently added via DLC who wields the Staff of the Magic God. She is a close-range character capable of long-range harassment, but her mid-range skills are weak.
shidenmissorka1ED_28.korean: 주공께서 사용하고 계신 매지컬 모모는 최근 DLC로 추가된, 마법신의 스태프를 사용하는 캐릭터입니다. 장거리 견제는 가능하지만 중거리 기술이 빈약한 근거리형 캐릭터지요.

shidenmissorka1ED_29.english: On the other hand, the T-3 Leprechaun that Master handles is a character that can attack reliably from any distance… Then this is…
shidenmissorka1ED_29.korean: 반면 스승님께서 다루시는 레프리콘은 모든 거리에서 안정적으로 공격할 수 있는 캐릭터… 그렇다면 이건…

shidenmissorka1ED_35.english: - Magical MoMo's ultimate move, "Magical Shining White Smoke Thrust," is a technique that instantly closes the distance with the opponent!
shidenmissorka1ED_35.korean: - 모모의 초필살기 《매지컬 샤이닝 백연 찌르기》는 상대와의 거리를 단숨에 좁히는 기술이다!

shidenmissorka1ED_38.english: Magical MoMo on the screen aims her sword and charges at the T-3 Leprechaun…!
shidenmissorka1ED_38.korean: - 화면 속에서 모모가 칼을 겨누고 레프리콘에게 돌격한다…!

shidenmissorka1ED_42.english: (This is unbelievable… You guarded my Magical MoMo’s White Flame Thrust with perfect timing and height…!?)
shidenmissorka1ED_42.korean: (말도 안 돼… 내 모모의 백연 찌르기를, 정확한 타이밍과 높이로 전부 막았다고…!?)

shidenmissorka1ED_43.english: - Immediately after using her ultimate move, Magical MoMo, having failed the attack, fell into a deep stun.
shidenmissorka1ED_43.korean: - 초필살기를 사용한 직후, 공격에 실패한 모모는 큰 경직에 빠졌고.

shidenmissorka1ED_44.english: Shiden's T-3 Leprechaun didn't miss the opening and landed a super special move.
shidenmissorka1ED_44.korean: - 시덴의 레프리콘은 그 틈을 놓치지 않고 초필살기를 꽂아 넣었다.

shidenmissorka2ED_20.english: Th-that can't be true, E-16 Talon Feather!
shidenmissorka2ED_20.korean: 그, 그럴 리 없어요, 탈론페더 씨!

shidenmissorka2ED_21.english: There is no way I would become Captain Khan the Swift's adjutant when I have E-16 Talon Feather!
shidenmissorka2ED_21.korean: 탈론페더 씨가 있는데, 감히 제가 칸 대장님의 부관이 될 리가 없잖아요!

shidenmissorka2ED_22.english: No, actually, just thinking about what it would be like to become Captain Khan the Swift's adjutant... well, it really brings back a lot of memories!
shidenmissorka2ED_22.korean: 아니, 케시크가 칸 대장님의 부관이 된다면 어떨지 생각해 보니까… 은근히 기대돼서요!

shidenmissorka2ED_63.english: T-75 War Wolf, stop it. Isn't Shiden having trouble too?
shidenmissorka2ED_63.korean: 워울프, 그쯤 해 둬라. 시덴이 곤란해하고 있지 않나.

shidenmissorka2ED_65.english: What…!? Khan the Swift, you… a Gyaru?

shidenmissorka2ED_7.english: Because the Horde's fighting style, where everyone adapts to the flow created by Captain Khan the Swift and T-75 War Wolf, basically doesn't work.
shidenmissorka2ED_7.korean: 칸 대장님과 워울프 씨가 만드는 흐름에 각자 맞춰 가는, 그런 호드의 일방적인 전투 방식은 기본적으로 통하지 않으니까요.

shidenmissorka3ED_104.english: Hehehe! I'll leave it to you, Ms. Audrey Dreamweaver!

shidenmissorka4ED_17.english: I'll do it! I'll do it! I'll let everyone hear cute P-29 Lindwurm's secret song!
shidenmissorka4ED_17.korean: 할래! 할래! 귀여운 린티의 비장의 노래, 모두에게 들려줄게!

shidenmissorka4ED_27.english: Khan the Swift… You don’t have to force yourself to participate.

shidenmissorka4ED_42.english: Yay~! That was the super cute P-29 Lindwurm's solo, 《LoverLover》~!
shidenmissorka4ED_42.korean: 예이~! 오르카에서 제일 귀여운 린티의 솔로, 《LoverLover》였습니다~!

shidenmissorka4ED_46.english: Hey there! Cute P-29 Lindwurm just sang an amazing solo, and you don't have any thoughts!?
shidenmissorka4ED_46.korean: 거기! 귀여운 린티가 멋진 노래를 불렀는데, 감상은 없는 거야!?

shidenmissorka4ED_6.english: I heard Orange said she wanted to see P-29 Lindwurm dressed as a cute gyaru...
shidenmissorka4ED_6.korean: 오렌지한테 귀여운 갸루 차림의 린티를 보고 싶다고 들었는데…

shidenmissorka4ED_83.english: If it weren't for BoRyeon and Teacher Audrey Dreamweaver, things wouldn't have changed this much... Thank you so much...
shidenmissorka4ED_83.korean:
보련이랑 오드리가 없었으면 이렇게까지 바뀌지 못했을 거야…
모두 너희들 덕분이야!

shidenmissorka5ED_96.english: I heard it from T-75 War Wolf. They say you’re a tail addict who really, really loves tails?
shidenmissorka5ED_96.korean: 워울프한테 들었어. 사령관, 꼬리를 엄청 좋아하는 꼬리 중독자라면서?
